description_long: This cabin features a simple, rectangular structure with a flat roof and a light wood-textured exterior. The front facade is distinguished by a pair of large, vertically oriented windows set side by side, framed in dark trim, allowing natural light to enter the interior. The other three sides each have a single, tall, narrow window, also framed in dark trim, providing additional illumination and a sense of openness. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible ornamentation or overhangs. The cabin sits directly on the ground with no visible foundation or steps, and there are no porches or exterior decorative elements. The structure appears compact and functional, suitable for urban infill or small-lot residential use.
description: A minimalist, rectangular cabin with a flat roof, light wood-textured exterior, and large dark-framed windows on each side. The design is clean and modern, with no porch or decorative elements.
description_view_0: The front view shows two large, vertically aligned windows side by side, set in a light wood facade.
description_view_1: This side view displays a single, tall, narrow window positioned off-center in the wood-textured wall.
description_view_2: The rear view features a single, tall, narrow window similar to the side, with no other openings or features.
description_view_3: The opposite side view also has a single, tall, narrow window, mirroring the other side.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with no overhangs or visible features
attribute_window_arrangement: Four windows in total: two large, vertically oriented windows grouped together on the front facade, and one tall, narrow window centered on each of the other three sides, creating an asymmetrical but balanced distribution.
attribute_door_placement: No exterior doors are visible on any side in the provided images.
